notes: One Microsoft Way, Redmond WA 98052. Maker of Windows NT Server 4.0.
Main NT Server competitor (NetWare); had 63% NOS market share at peak. Long decline post-1996.
Maker of Alpha processor; NT Server supported DEC Alpha; DEC and Microsoft settled VMS/NT intellectual property dispute.
OS/2 Warp Server competitor; PowerPC architecture supported by NT Server.
Developed LDAP standard cited in study for directory services.
